LanguageData.VFEA_BeingRecruited_Forbidden.descriptio: We should never allow ourselves to be recruited by another faction.
LanguageData.VFEA_BeingRecruited_Forbidden.label: forbidden
LanguageData.VFEA_Recruiting_Forbidden.description: It is wrong to accept any outsiders into our ranks.
LanguageData.VFEA_Recruiting_Forbidden.label: forbidden
